finding: The audio observer emits clock-progress-only, while the audibility outcome classifier previously matched clock-only. The mismatch incorrectly downgraded a valid clock-advance observation to not-heard-render-unconfirmed.

verification.source_inspection: Committed runtime and test now use the same emitted status string.
verification.adversarial_case: The obsolete clock-only string is explicitly asserted to remain unconfirmed, preventing accidental aliasing.
